query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  r.weekKey,
  r.decision,
  r.rescueAttempted,
  CAST(r.blockers AS CHAR) as blockers_json,
  CAST(r.top3Snapshot AS CHAR) as top3_json
FROM repDigestGateResults r
JOIN users u ON u.id = r.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('Dan Day', 'Daniel Zec')
  AND r.decision = 'HOLD'
ORDER BY r.id DESC
LIMIT 4;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  u.name,
  r.weekKey,
  r.decision,
  r.rescueAttempted,
  CAST(r.blockers AS CHAR) as blockers_json,
  CAST(r.top3Snapshot AS CHAR) as top3_json
FROM repDigestGateResults r
JOIN users u ON u.id = r.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('Dan Day', 'Daniel Zec')
  AND r.decision = 'HOLD'
ORDER BY r.id DESC
LIMIT 4;
